chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-4478 of 2016 Date Order with signature of Judge Priority. 1. For orders on Office Objection. 2. For hearing of Misc. No.22128/2017. 3. For hearing of Misc. No.22129/2017. 4. For hearing of Misc. No.27033/2016. 5. For hearing of Misc. No.22178/2016. 6. For hearing of main case. 02.10.2025. Mr. K. A. Vaswani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Mr. Khurram Ghayasuddin, Advocate for KMC. ---- No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioners and no intimation has been received. A perusal of the matter reflects that this Petition has not been effectively pursued over a protracted period. That, and the absence of representation today, suggests that the Petitioners have lost interest in the Petition, which stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
